violations.text: A measuring cup was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 200 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Sink was drained and refilled to the proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The rolling door to the outside, located in the garage/trash area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Sausage was observed held at 127 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sausage was reheated, water was added to steam table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Eggs were observed held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC adjusted thermostat during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
Establishment is using time as a public health control without authorization. Application was provided during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the garage/trash area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machines in kitchen and guest floors) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machines were taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machines must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the interior and exterior of the reach-in coolers and cabinets at the service line have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
